policies.policy_description: Regulations regarding the scheduling and management of flight crew duty times to ensure safety and mitigate fatigue.
policies.scope: Applicable to all operators and flight crew members.
policies.objective: To ensure that flight crew members are not fatigued and that their duty periods are within safe limits.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Standard allowance added at the end of flight time for completion of checks and records.
subpolicies.control: Specified in the FDTL Scheme of the operator.

compliances.Description: Ensure that all post flight duty times are recorded accurately in accordance with the FDTL Scheme of the operator.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from SERIES J PART - Flight Duty Time Limitations (FDTL)
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Ensure that all post flight duty times are recorded accurately in accordance with the FDTL Scheme of the operator.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Post Flight Duty Time Recording' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliances.Description: Complete all necessary checks and records as specified in the FDTL Scheme before the end of the post flight duty time.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from SERIES J PART - Flight Duty Time Limitations (FDTL)
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Complete all necessary checks and records as specified in the FDTL Scheme before the end of the post flight duty time.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Post Flight Checks Completion' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliances.Description: Document the post flight duty time in the flight log and ensure it is reviewed by a supervisor.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from SERIES J PART - Flight Duty Time Limitations (FDTL)
compliances.ComplianceTitle: Documentation of Post Flight Duty Time
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Document the post flight duty time in the flight log and ensure it is reviewed by a supervisor.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Documentation of Post Flight Duty Time' may increase exposure to security incidents, audit findings, and operational inefficiencies.

compliances.Description: Provide training to all crew members on the FDTL Scheme and the importance of post flight duty time compliance.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from SERIES J PART - Flight Duty Time Limitations (FDTL)
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Provide training to all crew members on the FDTL Scheme and the importance of post flight duty time compliance.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Training on FDTL Scheme' may increase exposure to security incidents, audit findings, and operational inefficiencies.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Operators shall define an eight-hour local night to cater for seasonal schedules.
subpolicies.control: May cater for type of aircraft/Fleet type.

compliances.Description: Operators must establish an eight-hour local night period that accommodates seasonal flight schedules, ensuring that it is defined for each type of aircraft or fleet type operated.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from SERIES J PART - Flight Duty Time Limitations (FDTL)
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Operators must establish an eight-hour local night period that accommodates seasonal flight schedules, ensuring that it is defined for each type of aircraft or fleet type operated.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Local Night Definition Compliance' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Operators shall not require a flight crew member to perform duties if they are known or suspected to be fatigued.
subpolicies.control: Safety of flight must not be adversely affected.

compliances.Description: Operators must ensure that no flight crew member is required to perform duties if they are known or suspected to be fatigued, thereby maintaining the safety of flight operations.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from SERIES J PART - Flight Duty Time Limitations (FDTL)
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Operators must ensure that no flight crew member is required to perform duties if they are known or suspected to be fatigued, thereby maintaining the safety of flight operations.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Fatigue Management Compliance' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Each Operator shall publish the Flight Crew Roster sufficiently in advance including weekly rest.
subpolicies.control: Ensures crew members are informed of their schedules.

compliances.Description: Each Operator shall publish the Flight Crew Roster sufficiently in advance including weekly rest to ensure crew members are informed of their schedules.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from SERIES J PART - Flight Duty Time Limitations (FDTL)
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Each Operator shall publish the Flight Crew Roster sufficiently in advance including weekly rest to ensure crew members are informed of their schedules.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Flight Crew Roster Publication' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Operators shall define a policy for assigning temporary home bases to flight crew.
subpolicies.control: Minimum duration of 7 days and maximum of 28 days.

compliances.Description: Operators must ensure that the assignment of temporary home bases to flight crew adheres to the specified minimum duration of 7 days and maximum of 28 days.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from SERIES J PART - Flight Duty Time Limitations (FDTL)
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Operators must ensure that the assignment of temporary home bases to flight crew adheres to the specified minimum duration of 7 days and maximum of 28 days.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Temporary Home Base Assignment Duration' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Operators should balance commercial imperatives with crew members’ ability to work effectively.
subpolicies.control: Includes principles for adequate rest and distribution of duties.

compliances.Description: Operators must ensure that all crew members receive a minimum of 10 hours of rest between shifts to maintain effective performance and safety.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from SERIES J PART - Flight Duty Time Limitations (FDTL)
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Operators must ensure that all crew members receive a minimum of 10 hours of rest between shifts to maintain effective performance and safety.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Adequate Rest Periods' may lead to severe security breaches, regulatory fines, and significant business disruption.

compliances.Description: Duties must be distributed evenly among crew members to prevent fatigue and ensure operational efficiency.
compliances.Notes: AI-generated from SERIES J PART - Flight Duty Time Limitations (FDTL)
compliances.ComplianceItemDescription: Duties must be distributed evenly among crew members to prevent fatigue and ensure operational efficiency.
compliances.PossibleDamage: Failure to comply with 'Duty Distribution' may increase exposure to security incidents, audit findings, and operational inefficiencies.

compliances.Description: Operators should limit shift lengths to a maximum of 12 hours to ensure crew members can perform effectively without excessive fatigue.
